title: Link a board to MySQL table
excerpt: Hello, I have a table on a MySQL db with about 100 records. Each has a Unique ID. I would like to link that table to a Monday.com board, so I can manage those items. when a new item gets added, it should be automatically…

posts.author: kcbhojwani (Keshav Bhojwani)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I have a table on a MySQL db with about 100 records. Each has a Unique ID. I would like to link that table to a Monday.com board, so I can manage those items. when a new item gets added, it should be automatically added to my board. is there a way to do this? Additionally, there should be a filter for each group on the board, for example select all rows from table where group = ‘1’ for group one, and where group = ‘2’ for group 2. Is this a possibility?

posts.author: amber-upstream (Amber Heaford)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @kcbhojwani ,

Warm welcome from upstream, your region’s longest-standing monday.com platinum partners!

Absolutely, syncing your MySQL DB with a monday.com board is doable! Via Zapier, make.com, or monday.com’s API, we can automate new entries from MySQL to appear on your board, tailored to filter into specified groups.

Keen to explore the perfect setup together during a complimentary discovery session. Email me directly at amber@upstreamtech.io to dive deeper!

Looking forward to connecting,

Warm Regards,
Amber | +61 8 7170 5246
